chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.06 of 2024 Mazhar Ali Versus Ahsan Ali & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 108/24 2. For orders on CMA 109/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.03.2024 None present. -.-.- None is present on behalf of the appellant. Even on the last date neither appellant nor his counsel was in attendance. Today position is same and there is no intimation either. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
